raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What feels off","name":"What feels a little off for you right now, Kenji?","description":"Safe opener that lets him name the issue in his own terms before any manager framing.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation fuzziness","name":"What's feeling unclear about what good looks like in your role?","description":"Surfaces uncertainty about the success bar and role expectations without sounding corrective.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Shifting requirements","name":"Where have the changing requirements been hardest to work with?","description":"Gets specific about the friction created by moving targets and how it affects his work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Asking for help","name":"What makes it easier or harder to ask for help here?","description":"Explores whether he feels safe raising confusion or frustration early.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Proving himself","name":"Where do you feel pressure to prove yourself in the work?","description":"Surfaces self-imposed pressure and whether it is shaping his choices or silence.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team setup friction","name":"What's making the role harder than it needs to be?","description":"Identifies process, access, or review friction the manager can remove.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoffs","name":"What are you choosing to say yes to right now?","description":"Reveals how he is prioritising work and whether the load is self-directed or imposed.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needs","name":"What would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?","description":"Moves toward concrete support without opening a new diagnosis.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What's one thing I could change that would remove friction for you?","description":"Directs the conversation toward actionable manager support and team setup changes.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Next step","name":"Given what we've talked about, what's the first thing you want to shift before we next meet?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into a concrete next move.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
